category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a recursive DNS resolver server with DNSSEC; official SDNS site repeats that it is a recursive DNS resolver server focused on privacy.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sdns; official website and GitHub README heading are SDNS.
docs_sources: Official SDNS site documents installation, flags, debugging, and configuration; GitHub README mirrors the same official documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/semihalev/sdns, so repo was not redetermined per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions recursive DNS resolver and DNSSEC; official SDNS site documents DNSSEC, resolver configuration, DNS-over-TLS, DNS-over-HTTPS, and DNS-over-QUIC settings.
